request: Plantuml always-download + java -jar runtime rewire. Drop detectSystemPlantuml short-circuit in src/cli/plantuml.js → fetchPlantumlIfMissing so the jar always lands at .claude/bin/plantuml.jar. Add Java-on-PATH preflight in install (Java becomes the new hard dep). Rewire .claude/hooks/plantuml_syntax_guard.sh and .claude/skills/spec-render/render.sh to invoke 'java -jar <baseline>/.claude/bin/plantuml.jar' instead of the system plantuml CLI. Update guide-mode messages (brew/apt advice becomes 'install JDK 17+'). Drop SKIPPED_SYSTEM_PLANTUML test cases; add Java-preflight + jar-missing-at-runtime test cases. Update bin/NOTICE deferred-fetch wording, bin/cli.js --no-plantuml/--require-plantuml flag-help text, README, seed.md mentions. Goal: make PINNED_SHA256 actually enforce a version instead of being decorative.
